name: fairy-tale-marketplace

plugins.name: fairy-tale
plugins.description: Fable/Mythos-informed workflow augmentation for coding, loop engineering, spiral engineering, double-helix learning loops, evolutionary spiral operators, loop job automation, cross-channel loop command, silent-loop auto-resume, do-not-disturb operating windows, usage-aware multi-agent load balancing, usage reading reference, closure/frame-completeness checks, negative-space and latent-need discovery, excess/redundancy/legacy-surface review, implicit-contract discovery, latent-structure discovery, benchmark runners, research, legal feedback loops, feedback pruning, Fairy Fusion review, domain reasoning, creative/UI/spatial work, and defensive security.
